args.code: (()=>{try{const g=window.game||{};const ls=localStorage;const d=JSON.parse(ls.getItem('farm_game_save_v1')||'{}');const errLog=ls.getItem('error_log')||'无';const fields=Array.isArray(d.fields)?d.fields:[];const fieldDetails=fields.map((f,i)=>{return{idx:i,crop:f.crop||f.cropType||'无',status:f.status||f.cropStatus||'idle',stage:f.stage||f.growthStage||0,growth:f.growth||f.growthProgress||0,water:f.water||f.waterLevel||0,fertility:f.fertility||f.fertilityLevel||0,days:f.remainingDays??f.daysLeft??'??'}});const quests=Array.isArray(d.quests)?d.quests:(d.questData?Object.entries(d.questData).map(([k,v])=>({id:k,...v})):(d.quests?[]:[]));const npcs=Array.isArray(d.npcs)?d.npcs:(d.npcData?Object.values(d.npcData):[]);const npcDetails=npcs.map(n=>({name:n.name||n.id||'?',friendship:n.friendship||0,unlocked:n.unlocked||false}));const pets=Array.isArray(d.pets)?d.pets.map(p=>p.name||p.type||''):(d.pets?Object.values(d.pets).map(p=>p.name||p.type||''):[]);const unlockedTabs=d.unlockedTabs||d.tabs||d.unlocked||[];const skills=Array.isArray(d.skills)?d.skills.map(s=>({name:s.name||s.id,level:s.level||0,exp:s.exp||0})):(d.skills?Object.entries(d.skills).map(([k,v])=>({name:k,level:v.level||v||0,exp:v.exp||0})):(g.skills?[]:[]));const milestoneList=Array.isArray(d.milestones)?d.milestones.map(m=>m.id||m):[];const eventList=Array.isArray(d.activeEvents)?d.activeEvents.map(e=>e.id||e.type||e):(Array.isArray(d.events)?d.events.map(e=>e.id||e.type||e):[]);const eventHistory=Array.isArray(d.eventHistory)?d.eventHistory.slice(-5):[];const warehouse=d.warehouse||d.storage||d.inventory||{};const products=d.products||d.processedGoods||d.warehouse?.products||{};const UIquestCount=document.querySelectorAll('.quest-item, .quest-card, [class*=quest]').length;const UItabCount=document.querySelectorAll('[class*=tab], .nav-item, .menu-item').length;const UImoney=document.querySelector('.money, .gold, [class*=money]')?.textContent||'';const UIstamina=document.querySelector('.stamina, [class*=stamina]')?.textContent||'';const UIhealth=document.querySelector('.health, [class*=health]')?.textContent||'';return JSON.stringify({ok:true,fieldDetails,questCountUI:UIquestCount,questCountData:quests.length,questIds:quests.slice(0,5).map(q=>q.id||q.name||'?'),npcDetails,npcCount:npcs.length,pets,petCount:pets.length,skills,skillCount:skills.length,skillTotalLevel:skills.reduce((a,s)=>a+(s.level||0),0),milestoneList,milestoneCount:milestoneList.length,eventList,eventHistory,eventHistoryCount:Array.isArray(d.eventHistory)?d.eventHistory.length:0,unlockedTabs,tabCountUI:UItabCount,warehouseKeys:Object.keys(warehouse),productKeys:Object.keys(products),UI:{money:UImoney,stamina:UIstamina,health:UIhealth},errorLog:errLog.slice(0,500),saveVersion:d.version||d.saveVersion||'-',saveSize:JSON.stringify(d).length})}catch(e){return JSON.stringify({ok:false,error:e.message})}})()
